timeline.text: Pre-transplant; 2–3 true leaf sets, approaching transplant readiness
Transplanted into Autopot XL (coco/perlite 60/40); hand-watering begins
Purple stem/leaf undersides first noted; labeled Plant A
Anthocyanin confirmed — deep purple leaf undersides, stems, petioles; elevated to primary keeper
~2 nodes, compact, stem base purple; training plan established
2–3 nodes, subtle stem color; all healthy
Purple expression continuing (new growth tips + petioles showing color); foliar burn incident on upper leaves (cosmetic only
Photos taken; monitoring foliar burn recovery and new growth
4–5 nodes developing; foliar burn stable (not spreading); no new issues
**Topped above node 4**; 5th node was emerging; most vigorous plant overall; strong purple contender alongside D
Recovery Day 1; monitoring for two new main shoots; LST target ~Apr 16–18
Post-topping recovery complete; vigorous multi-branch canopy; **LST due now** (Day 7 post-topping); v1.2 sensor → v2.0 swap
vigorous multi-branch canopy; main shoots sized up; **LST overdue** (Day 8 post-topping); moisture rising to 56% (autopot active
vigorous medium-green canopy; faint residual foliar burn on older leaves only; **LST critically overdue** (Day 9 post-topping); moisture stable ~52%

note.text: Day 37, nine days post-topping: vigorous medium-green multi-branch canopy with clean new growth; residual cosmetic foliar burn on a few older leaves only; LST is critically overdue. See [2026-04-20](../daily/2026-04-20.md).
